name: @pm-os/ai-assistant
description: AI-powered chat assistant with skills for summarization, drafting, and more

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.js --sourcemap && esbuild src/webview/chat-ui.ts --bundle --platform=browser --outfile=dist/webview/chat-ui.js --sourcemap && cp src/webview/index.html dist/webview/index.html && cp src/webview/styles.css dist/webview/styles.css
